text.title: confidence-thresholded-cascade Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for confidence-thresholded-cascade as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Calibrate on 100+ tasks; pick threshold where escalation rate is acceptable

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run eval at each bucket; if 0.9 confidence is only 70% accurate, adjust threshold

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: You've reverted to single-model — measure and remove the always-escalate path

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Cheap model is just a smaller version of strong model
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Often best; but check if a different family (cheaper provider) does better at filter-tier
